BlockGames

BlockGames is a cross-game, cross-chain, decentralized player network accelerating user growth for games, with personalised rewards for players.

Lucky Rolls are codes that give ‘rollers’ a chance to secure a Pre-sale $BLOCK allocation. The more Lucky Rolls you have, the higher the allocation you can buy for $BLOCK. Lucky Rolls can be added to your wallet on the Pre-Sale Dashboard.

Top tip: Lucky Rolls are allocated on a first come first serve basis, so you’ll need to be early to give yourself the best chance of success.

1 ETH = 95,000 BLOCK ( ~ 0.03$)

About the Project

BlockGames is a cross-game, cross-chain, decentralized player network accelerating user growth for games, with personalised rewards for players.

Seedify is a Blockchain Gaming focused Incubator and Launchpad. By staking $SFUND, you become eligible to buy game tokens before everyone else, giving you the edge in the play-to-earn era!
